The job failed due to unresolved merge conflicts during a rebase in the Sync Upstream Equicord workflow. The files with conflicts include:

.github/workflows/build.yml
.github/workflows/sync-upstream.yml
README.md
src/userplugins/doubleClickAntiLog/index.tsx
plugins.json
vencordplugins.json
Most conflicts occurred on protected files that the workflow attempts to auto-resolve using the "ours" strategy. However, other files (like plugins.json, vencordplugins.json) are not handled by this auto-resolving logic ("protected files"), requiring manual intervention.
